name_cn:
New Arrival 🆕 24K Autumn/Winter Collection 🍃
Double Compartment Camera Bag Large Black ♥
Purchased from the counter for 47,800 RMB.
The cool Double Compartment Camera Bag makes its debut as a new fashion favorite.
Practical double-pocket structure, cool and stylish 🆒
Fashionable light gold accents highlight luxury quality 〰️
It is the best companion to capture the beauty of life 🌟
Hardware: Thick-plated 14k light gold buckle
Leather: Cutting department ZP lambskin
Size: 18*24*17 cm
